title: IPL 2026: BCCI reveals full second phase schedule - Check out
content: The IPL 2026 season resumes on April 13, with the Board of Control for Cricket in India unveiling the schedule for the remaining 50 league matches. The tournament will span across 12 Indian venues until May 24, featuring eight double-headers. This revised plan ensures the league progresses despite earlier election date uncertainties, with no reduction in matches planned.

title: 'Can't stand in queues': K'taka MLA demands free IPL tickets; Speaker orders VIP passes
content: A Karnataka MLA sparked a controversy by alleging that legislators are denied "entitled" IPL passes, forced into queues, and face inflated ticket prices due to alleged black marketing by KSCA. The Assembly Speaker has now directed the government to ensure MLAs receive VIP tickets, addressing concerns of disrespect and indignity.

title: CEO of America's largest bank reveals one work-from-home trend he didn't notice earlier
content: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticizes remote work, citing a lack of attentiveness in virtual meetings and its detrimental impact on young employees' learning and emotional intelligence. He argues that in-office presence is crucial for skill development and project ownership, contrasting it with the 'game playing' and reduced accountability he observes in remote setups.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 8: Ranveer Singh film eyes 'Dhurandhar 1' record of Rs 840
content: As Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge enters its eighth day on Thursday, March 26, 2026, the Ranveer Singh starrer is rewriting the history of Indian cinema. Having already shattered the Rs. 1,000 crore worldwide milestone in record time, the film is now tracking at nearly double the efficiency of previous blockbusters like 'Jawan', 'Pathaan', and 'Animal.' Despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the sequel's domestic net collection has surged to more than Rs. 630 crore, fueled by unprecedented demand for midnight screenings and a gripping narrative that sees Jaskirat Singh Rangi, played by Ranveer Singh deeper than ever into the Karachi underworld as Hamza Ali Mazari.

title: 'Some hope to profit from discord': Envoy flags 'China threat' hype in India
content: Chinese Ambassador Xu Feihong urged Indian youth to adopt objective views, cautioning against narratives amplifying a "Beijing threat." He emphasized the mutual benefit of partnership and encouraged more cultural exchanges to foster a balanced perception between the two nations.

title: Get rid of old assumptions: Microsoft HR makes it clear to employees that it's time to change
content: Microsoft's Chief People Officer Amy Coleman announced a significant HR restructuring, prioritizing adaptability and speed for the AI era. This shakeup includes leadership changes and new teams focused on accelerating HR operations, employee experience, and workforce skilling. The move signals a shift towards agility and a faster pace for the tech giant.

title: Man ends life after apology video at police station goes viral
content: A man died by suicide in Rajasthan's Balotra district, with his family alleging harassment by usurers. The creditors reportedly recorded and viralized an apology video of the deceased on police station premises, despite a consensus on repayment being reached. Two accused have been detained.

title: 'Have 60-day stock of oil': Govt dismisses with 'disdain' reports of depleted reserves
content: India's fuel supply remains stable and secure. The government assures citizens that petrol, diesel, and LPG are readily available nationwide. Officials are combating a misinformation campaign designed to create panic. Strategic reserves are robust, covering approximately 60 days of supply. Domestic production and imports ensure continuous availability of essential fuels.

title: Super Micro shareholders sue company's CEO and CFO along with co-founders
content: Super Micro Computer shareholders are suing the tech firm for securities fraud, alleging it concealed its reliance on Chinese sales that violated US export laws. Co-founder Yih-Shyan Liaw and two others were indicted for smuggling Nvidia chips to China, prompting Liaw's resignation from the board. The company asserts its commitment to compliance despite the alleged actions.

title: 'Prove me wrong': Ex-India batter throws challenge to Rahane ahead of IPL 2026
content: Aakash Chopra believes Ajinkya Rahane has a point to prove in IPL 2026, particularly regarding his post-powerplay scoring, despite a strong IPL 2025. Chopra also highlighted Rinku Singh's potential as a future captain and urged Varun Chakaravarthy to regain his wicket-taking form after a dip in the T20 World Cup.

title: Donations to national parties surged 161% in FY25, BJP got lion's share
content: The BJP received over 91% of declared donations above Rs 20,000 by national parties in FY25, totaling Rs 6,074 crore. Overall political funding surged 161% to Rs 6,648 crore, with corporate donations dominating. The BJP's collections alone jumped 171% from the previous fiscal year.

title: Nayara Energy hikes petrol prices by Rs 5, diesel by Rs 3 amid Middle East crisis
content: Nayara Energy has increased petrol and diesel prices. This move comes as global oil prices climb due to the Middle East crisis. Other fuel retailers are taking different approaches. Some are absorbing losses, while state-run companies have kept standard fuel prices unchanged since April 2022. Premium petrol prices have risen.

title: 'Don't ask about Pakistan cricket': Irritated Afridi shushes media - Watch
content: Shaheen Shah Afridi drew attention at a PSL 2026 event by avoiding questions on Pakistan’s poor international form, asking reporters to focus only on the league. In a viral moment, he said, “Don’t ask about Pakistan… ask questions on PSL only.” The incident comes amid criticism after Pakistan’s early T20 World Cup exit, while Lahore Qalandars prepare to start their title defence.

title: New flight ticket refund & cancellation rules effective today: How will passengers benefit?
content: The change in refund rules underlines the ‘minimum requirements for refund of ticket’. This includes tickets for both domestic and international travel, booked with domestic and international airlines operating to and from India.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' actor says he was heartbroken to see less occupancy in theatres
content: Despite facing cancelled paid reviews and widespread negative publicity, Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has achieved massive box office success. Actor Danish Pandor shared his emotional journey from a disheartening opening day to the film's triumphant run, highlighting the power of audience reception over initial hurdles.

title: 'Worst nightmare top tennis player can have': Iga Swiatek
content: Iga Swiatek admitted she is going through a difficult phase after her Miami Open loss, calling it “the worst nightmare” as her level drops. Despite her success, pressure has led to overthinking and self-doubt, worsened by a past suspension and losing the No 1 ranking. Though she won Wimbledon, inconsistency remains. She has now split with coach Wim Fissette and aims to regain confidence and control of her game.

title: Middle East crisis: PM Modi to hold talks with CMs tomorrow, review preparedness
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will convene a virtual meeting with chief ministers on Friday to assess India's preparedness for the ongoing Middle East conflict. The discussion will focus on coordinating national and state-level responses, particularly concerning supply chains, energy, and emergency systems. States under the model code of conduct will have a separate meeting.

title: 'Excessive noise' forces London-bound AI flight to divert after 7 hours in air
content: Air India's new Airbus A350, VT-JRF, faced a recurring issue with turbulence and noise in its belly hold, forcing a return to Delhi from a London-bound flight. This marks the second such incident in ten days, prompting a DGCA investigation. The aircraft had previously diverted to Shannon for checks after a similar problem on a New York to Delhi route.

title: BCCI unveils India’s 2026-27 home fixtures: 22 matches across 17 cities
content: Team India gears up for a massive 2026-27 home cricket season, hosting West Indies, Sri Lanka, Zimbabwe, and Australia in 22 matches across 17 cities. The packed schedule features ODIs, T20Is, and culminates with a five-Test Border-Gavaskar Trophy against Australia, promising thrilling contests nationwide.

title: Mar-a-Loss: Amid Iran war, Trump faces embarrassing electoral defeat in Florida
content: Amid a protracted war with Iran and a presidency still defined by scale and confrontation, Trump now finds himself confronting one such moment, an embarrassing loss in a district that includes Mar-a-Lago.

title: Watch: Strangers, a dog, and a moment the world chose to remember
content: A heartwarming act of kindness in Almaty, Kazakhstan, where strangers formed a human chain to rescue a dog from a reservoir in 2016, has been immortalized in a bronze sculpture. Unveiled recently, the artwork celebrates solidarity and collective action, reigniting online discussions about humanity's capacity for compassion and reminding us of the value in simple, selfless gestures.

title: CSK’s risky call: Injured Spencer Johnson replaces injured Nathan Ellis
content: CSK’s decision to sign Spencer Johnson as a replacement for injured Nathan Ellis has raised questions, with the Australian pacer still recovering from a back injury. Despite pulling out of the PSL and not playing competitive cricket recently, Johnson is gradually returning to bowling. His delayed arrival and fitness status highlight the growing challenge of finding replacements during IPL 2026.

title: Indian-origin man charged in Singapore for driving car with children on rear boot
content: A man of Indian origin faces charges in Singapore. He allegedly drove a luxury car with his two young children sitting on the rear boot. This dangerous act put the children's lives at risk. Authorities have stated that such behavior is unacceptable and violates traffic rules. Strict action will be taken against those who endanger lives.

title: Candace Owens' claim about Erika Kirk’s 'secret location' sparks row
content: Candace Owens has intensified scrutiny over Erika Kirk’s location during the assassination of Charlie Kirk. She claims Erika was inside a secretive, unmarked aviation building, contradicting her account of being at a medical facility. Owens also pointed to a lack of witnesses, calling the situation “secretive,” and raising broader questions about the timeline and transparency surrounding the events of that day.

title: Bab al-Mandeb: How the 'Gate of Tears' may emerge as Iran’s second choke point after Hormuz
content: Iran has issued a stern warning, threatening to disrupt the vital Bab al-Mandeb Strait if the US and Israel attempt a ground invasion of Iranian territory, including Kharg Island. This move, coupled with existing control over the Strait of Hormuz, could significantly escalate economic disruption. Iran-aligned Houthis in Yemen are reportedly poised to join this effort, expanding the conflict's reach.

title: Did Israel drop Iran's Araghchi, Qalibaf from its hit list on Pak's request?
content: Pakistan claims it successfully intervened with Washington to prevent Israel from targeting senior Iranian officials, Foreign Minister Abbas Aragchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf. Islamabad argued their elimination would leave no one for de-escalation talks. This follows reports of Israel granting temporary immunity to the Iranian figures during ongoing negotiations.

title: US weighs redirecting Ukraine-bound weapons to Middle East: Report
content: The Pentagon is reportedly considering rerouting some weapons, including air defence interceptors, originally destined for Ukraine to the Middle East due to strains on US stockpiles from the ongoing Iran war. This move highlights the difficult choices Washington faces in balancing support for Kyiv with its operational needs in the region.

title: ‘Not as spicy anymore’: AB de Villiers flags concern over MI star ahead of IPL
content: Former South Africa captain AB de Villiers has expressed concern for Mumbai Indians ahead of IPL 2026, suggesting Trent Boult may have lost pace and effectiveness. De Villiers warned that this could be an area opposition batters might target, despite the team's otherwise strong squad.  However, Abhinav Mukund remains optimistic about Mumbai's depth and balance.

title: LPG vs PNG explained: What's the difference between these fuels?
content: Global energy market tensions, particularly concerning the Strait of Hormuz, have highlighted the vulnerabilities of LPG supply to India. In contrast, piped natural gas (PNG) remains largely unaffected due to its integrated pipeline network, offering greater supply security for households and businesses.

title: 'Always the villain in the story': Faf du Plessis' unique take on Gautam Gambhir
content: Former South African captain Faf du Plessis lauded Gautam Gambhir's leadership, calling him a 'villain' for rivals but a respected figure for his team.  Du Plessis highlighted Gambhir's high standards and accountability, evident in his successful stints with KKR and India's recent limited-overs triumphs, despite Test match struggles.

title: Toll system in Hormuz? Iran drafts bill to charge ships for safe passage amid war
content: The Middle East war has intensified an oil crisis as Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz disrupt global energy supplies.  While the Red Sea's Bab el-Mandeb Strait is considered an alternative, it also faces threats. Reopening Hormuz is complicated by its geography and requires significant security measures, including a multinational coalition, to overcome the risks of attacks and minefields.

title: Bengaluru professor proposes to girl in classroom; student hits him with slipper
content: Chaos erupted at Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Sciences after Professor Mohammed allegedly proposed to a student in class, claiming she reciprocated his feelings. The student vehemently denied this, leading to a heated exchange and a physical altercation where she reportedly assaulted him. The incident, captured on video, has sparked widespread outrage.

title: Murray drops 53, Jokic nearly has 20-20-20 game
content: Jamal Murray scored 53 points and Nikola Jokic had 23 points, 21 rebounds and 19 assists as the Nuggets held off the Mavericks on Wednesday night.

title: Wolves post largest OT comeback on record
content: With a game-closing 15-0 run, the Timberwolves came back from 13 points down for a 110-108 victory over the Rockets on Wednesday night.

title: Draymond: Hated and loved Wemby's MVP case
content: Warriors forward Draymond Green said he both "hated" and "absolutely loved" the MVP self-promotion from Spurs center Victor Wembanyama.

title: QB Simpson says he's 'absolutely' 1st-round pick
content: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.

title: Nacua sued over alleged antisemitic remark, bite
content: A woman in Los Angeles has filed a civil lawsuit against Puka Nacua alleging the Rams wide receiver made an "unprovoked antisemitic statement" and later bit her on the shoulder.

title: Fried's gem lifts Yanks despite Judge's 4-K opener
content: Max Fried allowed just two hits in 6⅓ scoreless innings, and the Yankees cruised past the Giants 7-0 on Wednesday night despite Aaron Judge's first career hitless Opening Day.

title: Arizona's Lloyd brushes off UNC job speculation
content: Amid speculation he could be a candidate for the vacancy at North Carolina, Arizona coach Tommy Lloyd insisted all his attention is with his program ahead of Thursday's Sweet 16 game against Arkansas.

title: Brown-led Celts hand Thunder first loss in month
content: Jaylen Brown scored 14 of his 31 points in a pivotal third quarter, and the Boston Celtics rallied to beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 119-109 on Wednesday night, snapping the defending champions' 12-game win streak.

content: Whether it's the coach, the players, or both, Real Madrid have improved since Álvaro Arbeloa took over in January, and he could yet save their season.

content: The Los Angeles Lakers star brought the vinyl for the rapper to sign while James met Cole's children.

content: How to bet on top-2 seeds Purdue, Houston and Duke in Thursday's and Friday's regional semifinal games.

content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: 'What I'm thinking is arena football but outdoors': How Mike Repole is remaking the UFL
content: Repole is the man behind many of the UFL's changes, including smaller venues and the four-point field goal.

title: Max Verstappen vs. F1's new rules: Every complaint this season -- and our verdict
content: Amid a wave of complaints from F1's four-time world champion Max Verstappen, ESPN's Nate Saunders examines every one and gives his verdict on if they are warranted.

content: Mike Clay shares his favorite notes from the research that informed his fantasy projections for 2026.

title: 'Definitely not my final chapter': A refreshed Israel Adesanya isn't done yet
content: He may have traded right hooks and calf kicks for DJ decks last year, but Israel Adesanya insists he is motivated to continue his UFC career -- starting this weekend against Joe Pyfer.

title: Cost of the World Cup: How much might a USMNT fan spend to follow their team?
content: From tickets to hotels, how expensive is this summer's big event? Let's find out -- through the eyes of a USMNT fan on the trip of a lifetime.

content: the offseason is a time of hope for all sports fans . this year, everyone's favorite team will right its ship, reach its potential . we think about those with expectations that things can be better, that things better get better .

title: NHL playoff watch: Who will win the Pacific Division 'pillow fight'?
content: the 2025-26 Pacific division will qualify at least three teams for the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs . the playoffs will take place on friday . it's the second time in a three-day stretch that the teams went winless with six in action .

title: 'Changing of the guard': Cole Hutson poised to take big role in next wave for the Capitals
content: the 19-year-old defenseman was days out from signing his three-year, entry-level contract with the Washington Capitals . he surprised Hughes with his strength, prompting a frustrated rebuttal by Hughes via cross-check to the ice . it's early yet, but the message from Hutson was clear: this NHL stage wasn't intimidating the teen .

title: LuLu Group Chairman Briefs PM Modi On Uninterrupted Food Supplies To Gulf Region
content: He briefed the prime minister on LuLu Group's recent initiatives aimed at supporting food security across its GCC markets.

title: No Shortage, India's Energy Supply Secure For "Many Months": Centre
content: The Centre said India has 74 days of total reserve capacity and around 60 days of actual stock cover.

title: Is Russia Secretly Helping Iran With Drones, Food, Data? Kremlin Denies
content: Citing Western intelligence assessments, the report said that Moscow began sending the drones to Tehran this month and is set to complete the phased shipment of the equipment by the end of the month.

title: Karnataka Professor Proposes To Student In Front Of Class, Beaten On Campus
content: The professor claimed that the student had expressed her love for him and that he has proof for the same.

title: Bengaluru Woman, Brother Stabbed To Death By Minor Son Of Husband's Lover
content: A woman and her brother were allegedly stabbed to death by a minor following a dispute linked to an alleged relationship, police said. The incident took place under the Peenya police station limits in Bengaluru.

title: Afghanistan-Pakistan Cross Border Clashes Resume After Eid Ceasefire Ends
content: Pakistani attacked Afghan districts of Narai and Sarkano, killing two civilians and wounding eight others after the ceasefire expired.

content: While US space research priorities can oscillate with each political cycle, the Chinese model offers predictability and risk management, an expert says.

content: Iraq granted pro-Iran factions within the forces the right to exercise "self-defence" but also promised to prosecute groups targeting US interests.

content: Leader of Opposition, BJP's R Ashoka, targeted KSCA. "We have given them 16.32 acres at a nominal price, but they charge us thousands for match tickets.

content: A report revealed that Field Marshal Asim Munir had reached out to Trump, proposing Pakistan as the "venue" for talks. This was on March 23, at about the same time that the 'five-day' pause was announced.

content: The audit emphasises that the "rats and moisture" theory does not adequately justify the scale of the missing drugs.

content: The ambassador said both countries should act as good neighbours and help each other succeed. He expressed China's willingness to welcome Indian youth to China.

content: Sara Sky, believed to be the first shipment of Russian oil to the Philippines in five years, was reportedly seen at a port just outside Manila.

content: US comments about Tehran fearing for its own life over admitting involvement in the peace deal came after the Iranian claim of not intending to negotiate.

Kader Mohideen, 86, the national president of the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML), a long-standing ally of the DMK, speaks to The Hindu on the performance of the DMK government, the expansion of the Secular Progressive Alliance, the fledgling TVK led by actor Vijay, and more. title: No reels, short videos during class hours: Delhi government directive to schools
content: However, the Directorate of Education said content related to "academic, cultural or awareness themes may be created" with prior approval of the competent authority and under a teacher's supervision

title: ‘Prathichaya’ movie review: Not even a whitewash can contemporise this old-fashioned political thriller
content: Even as the Nivin Pauly starrer ‘Prathichaya’ tackles the complex game of image-making in politics, it often feels like the movie stuck in the past, delivering predictable twists and one-dimensional characters

title: 13 killed, 25 injured in bus-truck collision in Markapuram

title: BJP failed to address inflation, unemployment; rely on propaganda: Akhilesh Yadav
content: Questioning the government's preparedness in dealing with rising costs and supply issues, he alleged that changes in LPG cylinder supply were not matched with adequate production planning.

title: Kerala polls: CPI(M) leader K.K. Shailaja confident of winning from Peravoor, considered a Congress bastion
content: Banking on a mix of development promises, the veteran CPI(M) leader in Kerala says past administrative experience and what she terms as ‘growing dissatisfaction’ over lack of major initiatives in the constituency in the past 15 years would help her to win the election against the incumbent UDF MLA

title: CBI conducts searches in Reliance Telecom Ltd. case

title: BJP got highest donations in 2024-25, over 10 times all other national parties combined: ADR
content: The report, released on Thursday (March 26, 2026), said total donations above ₹20,000 declared by the national parties stood at ₹6,648.563 crore from 11,343 contributions in FY25.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: PMK founder Ramadoss releases election manifesto, promises caste-based census
content: The 101-page manifesto, released by Mr. Ramadoss, outlined several promises, including quality, compulsory, and free education

title: India has 60 days of oil stocks, one month of LPG supplies: Govt
content: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said all petrol pumps across the country are adequately stocked and operating normally, with no rationing of petrol or diesel

title: Manipur village attacked for second time, students also fired upon
content: Armed extremists fire at Mongkot Chepu village in Ukhrul district for the second successive day on Tuesday

title: How an ex-IPS officer, transferred by Election Commission for praising Jayalalithaa, later became AIADMK MLA

title: ICAR-Central Tuber Crops Research Institute develops electronic starch indicator for cassava
content: The device enables farmers and stakeholders to determine starch content quickly and accurately through a two-step process

title: All private buses should adhere to safety norms: Deputy Transport Commissioner
content: The Vizianagaram Deputy Transport Commissioner said that the department had been conducting inspections in nearly 50 private buses plying to various destinations

title: BIMS turns 50, to host golden jubilee celebrations in Mysuru

title: Bengaluru metro to extend services till 2 a.m. for IPL match on March 28

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Manamadurai constituency voters seek tangible change
content: While the constituency encompassed three blocks – Thirupuvanam, Ilayangudi and Manamadurai – none of them had witnessed any industrial or education growth in the past five years, the public felt.

title: Kerala Assembly polls: SDPI pulls out of Manjeswaram contest, easing vote-split concerns for UDF

title: Puravankara to unveil 30 new projects in 24 months
content: The proposed pipeline of projects will comprise some 51.14 million sq. ft. of developable area, with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹55,000 crore

title: DMK can release unfulfilled promises as its manifesto: Anbumani Ramadoss
content: In a statement, he claimed that 439 of the 505 promises made ahead of the 2021 Assembly elections remain unfulfilled, accusing the ruling party of misleading the public with claims of near-total implementation

title: Major fire breaks out at oil recycling firm in Kerala’s Edayar; 1 killed

title: Fatal bus accident in Markapuram District sparks Statewide shock

title: PM Modi expresses condolences over Markapur road accident, announces ex-gratia

title: Markapuram bus-truck collision: Andhra Pradesh Ministers express grief

title: Recurring bus infernos in Andhra Pradesh highlight regulatory gaps, trigger safety review

title: DGCA asks Air India to take corrective actions after wrong plane deployment to Vancouver
content: A Vancouver-bound Air India Boeing 777-200 LR aircraft, after being airborne for over seven hours, returned to Delhi on March 19 after it was found that the plane was not approved for operating the flight

title: Iran War tests European unity amid German economic slowdown and fears over Ukraine support
content: The stand of EU member states in the conflict is divergent as Europe faces economic slowdown and inflation amid rising oil and gas prices; Germany fears opposing U.S.-Israel actions could prompt U.S. to withdraw support from Ukraine, while the war could hurt its already faltering economy more

title: Ranking all 52 NCAA tournament losses
content: a team that walks off the court stunned, jerseys and towels covering tears . a fan base with high expectations and disappointment about the early exit is behind every one of those heartbroken teams . every team's exit is categorized into one of the most devastating .

title: A closer look at every UFL team's new uniforms for 2026
content: the "Get Up" crew reacts to the announcement that field goals from 60 yards or more will be worth four points . the eight-team spring football league returns with three relocated franchises and a full slate of redesigned uniforms . each team will take the field in updated looks -- from modern designs to throwback-inspired styles .

title: 'We're all still learning': How NIL, big-money schools are impacting college hockey
content: a college hockey game was held in the nation's second-largest football stadium . nearly 75,000 people had gathered to watch the game . the event was a testament to Penn State's investment in hockey .

title: Saudi Pro League, MLS or elsewhere: Where could Salah go next?
content: Mohamed Salah is leaving Liverpool at the end of the season after nine years . he joined the club in 2016 when they were still enduring their long wait for a league title . his impact on Liverpool can hardly be overstated, but where could Salah head next?

title: UCLA coach Kelly Inouye-Perez breaking records amid changing landscape
content: Kelly Inouye-Perez is the all-time winningest coach in the history of the division I softball program . in her 20th year as head coach, she added the record to a list of accomplishments . "we are so much more than wins," she says .

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: Nick Lodolo, Kirby Yates to start season on IL
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . 11 games on the docket, beginning at 1:15 p.m. ET when Paul Skenes and the Pittsburgh Pirates take on Freddy Peralta and the New York Mets at Citi Field . there are still six teams that won't play their first game until Friday .

title: How to bet the Houston Open: Koepka stands out, but what about Gotterup?
content: the PGA heads to Memorial Park for the Texas Children's Houston Open . it's a grip-it-and-rip-it setup where drivers get a green light and fairways barely matter . off the tee gives players the advantage but it doesn't win it for them .
